reviews.review_description: I was like ‘hmm i wanna know how to be a doctor so i played it’ AND I GOT FLASHED WITH THE MOST VIOLENT NUDE GAME EVER!!! PLEASE DELETE THIS GAME. ITS REALLY BAD! DONT BUY
Dude, this game is hard to do, and the random beeping noises is killing my head! And don’t even get me started on that NPC, there are kids in this platform! Delete this game now!

developer_response.body: Alright, that is actually an alarm that plays when the time runs out. I understand that it may feel distracting, so I probably need to add more rules, explanations, and clearer details to improve the experience.

developer_response.body: “Thank you for the support and feedback. We understand that a simulator like this may not be suitable for everyone, but we have already provided notices and context that it is intended for simulation and educational purposes. Moving forward, we will continue improving the quality, presentation, and content adjustments to make the experience better and more professional.

developer_response.body: We are still developing it, and we also provide a notice at the beginning that it is intended for demonstration and simulation purposes. We will continue refining and adjusting the content and overall polish to make it better.
